Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Arbitration And Stay Proceedings
Off Calendar Apr-19-2019 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Daniel Henderson, Esq., Shegerian & Associates, Inc., 310-860-0770, appearing for Plaintiff Jacquelyn Kaehler; (CourtCall)
Sara Church Reese, Esq., Gordon & Rees, LLP, 916-565-2900, appearing for Defendant(s) Veritas Investments, Inc. et al;

Hearing is held. The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

DEFENDANTS CHRISTIAN SMITH, VERITAS INVESTMENTS, INC., RENTSFNOW, and MARY KATHRYN CLAUSSEN (ERRONEOUSLY SUED AS MARY Kathy Claussen)'s Motion To Compel Arbitration And Stay Proceedings

Taken under submission.
